title: Regarding number of participant in Monday App challenges
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
Is their any constraint in the maximum number of people in the team?

posts.author: Dhruv (Dhruv Trehan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Is their any constraint in the maximum number of people in the team?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Dhruv

A warm welcome to the monday.com community! Glad to have you here with us

I’ve just double-checked this with the team for you and I can confirm there is no limit on the number of people within a team that can participate in the challenge. I’m already excited to see what your team could come up with!

-Alex
